nasb.text: Now these things happened as examples for us, so that we would not crave evil things as they also craved.

esv.text: Now these things took place as examples for us, that we might not desire evil as they did.

cnv.text: 這些事都是我們的鑒戒，叫我們不要貪戀惡事，像他們那樣。

ccb.text: 如今这些事正好警戒我们，叫我们不要像他们那样贪恋罪恶，

csbs.text: 这些事的发生，是为了我们的鉴戒，好使我们不像他们成为贪恋恶事的人。
